SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.automation

Class AgenticProcessOptimizer.OptimizationResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.automation.AgenticProcessOptimizer.OptimizationResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
AgenticProcessOptimizer
public static final class AgenticProcessOptimizer.OptimizationResult extends Object implements Serializable
Outcome of an optimization run, including the best point and the full trajectory.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description

    bestObjective
    Raw objective value at the best point.

    Minimized score at the best point.

    Human-readable status message.

    Serialization id.
    private boolean
    success
    True when at least one point was evaluated successfully.

    trajectory
    Full trajectory of evaluated points.

    • isSuccess

      public boolean isSuccess()
      Returns whether the run produced at least one evaluation.
      Returns:
      true on success

    • isFeasible

      Returns whether a feasible optimum was found.
      Returns:
      true if feasible

      Returns the status message.

      Returns the minimized score at the best point.

      the best score

      Returns the full trajectory of evaluated points.

      the trajectory list
